sigWerErrors.reason: 'jeans' and 'jean' are very similar and often used interchangeably in Vietnamese to refer to denim pants; the meaning is unchanged.
'chật' means 'tight' (correct in context), while 'chặt' means 'tight' in the sense of 'firmly' or 'to cut/chop'; this changes the meaning and makes the sentence less coherent.
'trả lại' means 'return (an item)', while 'trở lại' means 'come back/return (oneself)'; this changes the meaning of the sentence significantly.
